name: Advanced Persistent Threat Platform
description: Sophisticated command-and-control infrastructure for maintaining long-term covert access to enemy networks. Includes custom malware frameworks, proxy chains, and data exfiltration systems.

specialAbilities.name: Persistent Network Access
specialAbilities.description: Maintains covert footholds in enemy government and military networks for months, enabling continuous intelligence collection.

specialAbilities.name: Bulk Data Exfiltration
specialAbilities.description: Steals classified documents, weapons designs, and diplomatic communications at scale from compromised networks.
